LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF CORE FUNDING GROUP LP'S MOTION FOR APPOINTMENT OF A RECEIVER IS CONTINUED TO MARCH 12, 2008. (1) PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER AND AGREE TO A FORM OF RELIEF. IF THEY CANNOT AGREE, NO LATER THAN NOON OF MARCH 10, 2008, EACH SIDE MUST SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER TO IDENTIFY ISSUES NOT AGREED UPON OR OTHERWISE REFLECT WHAT THE COURT OUGHT TO DO IN THAT MOTION. 2) IF THE PARTIES REACH AN AGREEMENT, THEY CAN APPEAR IN THE EX-PARTE CALENDAR.
